# Connector Layer 



Adapters Provide external bridges for connections (eg. fetching data) from 

- IRDIA
- GALAXY
- USER provided data (csv)
- USER provided metadata 
...

## Summary table of functions 

| Function | Role | Input | Output | Location |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `adapter_xx.py` |  Adapter for external data source XX | API request parameters | API response data | `libs/connector` |

 ## Reasons behind the choices made



Connectors are configured via a simple `connectors.yml` file. This YAML dictionary defines the API endpoints, expected authentication headers (managed securely via environment variables), and payload structures. This allows the application to point to different instances (e.g., a local IRIDA cluster vs. Galaxy Europe) without changing any Python code.
